body: This PR upgrades to the latest dependencies and overloads ClimaTimeSteppers methods so that we can more easily iterate on fixing #2015. (cc @simonbyrne)
title: Update manifest files, overload ClimaTimeSteppers

body: This PR unfuses the hard-coded ARS updates, so that we can swap between the generic and hard-coded versions without any behavioral changes.
title: Unfuse hard-coded ARS updates
